title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Software Engineer in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
